articles.title: Is Now a Good Time to Invest in Ethereum?
articles.description: An on-chain analyst is bullish on Ethereum (ETH), highlighting an attractive risk-reward scenario for potential investors. The post Is Now a Good Time to Invest in Ethereum? appeared first on Cryptodnes.

articles.title: VanEck Launches Solana PYTH ETN to Expand in Europe
articles.description: VanEck announces PYTH ETN on Euronext, providing European investors exposure to Solana-backed Pyth Network without direct crypto holdings. VanEck has expanded its European lineup with the launch of a new PYTH ETN, giving investors access to the Solana-backed Pyth Network without direct cryptocurrency ownership. The product, listed on Euronext Amsterdam and Euronext Paris, opens investment in...

articles.title: ETH-to-BTC market cap ratio declines to 24.52%, its lowest level since April 2021
articles.description: This metric serves as an indicator of relative market sentiment and capital flows between crypto's two largest assets.

articles.title: ETH/BTC hits lowest point in over 3 years, sliding to 0.03508
articles.description: Ethereums valuation against Bitcoin (ETH/BTC) has reached a new low of 0.03508, at the time of writing, marking its lowest level since April 2021.ETH/BTC Chart (TradingView)This decline to a 3.5-year low has intensified discussions around Ethereums market cycle and its potential approach to its lower logarithmic regression trend line that has historically provided support during bearish...

articles.title: Chainlink completes pilot on integrating tokenized assets with Swift payment system
articles.description: Chainlink (LINK) reaches out to banks and regulators to test potential solutions for cross-chain communication and settlements using the Swift system.

articles.title: Michigan Pension Fund Makes Historic Ethereum Investment
articles.description: Michigan’s pension fund leads the way with a historic Ethereum ETF investment, signaling a shift toward broader crypto adoption in public funds.

articles.title: Ethereum ETFs Gain Traction as Michigan Pension Fund Buys $10M Stake
articles.description: Michigan’s State Pension Fund disclosed a $10 million investment in Grayscale’s Ethereum ETF, paving the way for ETH institutional adoption.
